entity.label: Gareb
entity.subtitle: Mountain
entity.description: A hill near Jerusalem (Jer. 31:39), probably the hill of lepers, and consequently a place outside the boundary of the city.

nodes.label: Gareb
nodes.description: A hill near Jerusalem (Jer. 31:39), probably the hill of lepers, and consequently a place outside the boundary of the city.

verses.text: And the measuring line shall yet go forth over against it upon the hill Gareb, and shall compass about to Goath.
